story.iWant: to preview conversion details and confirm settings before batch conversion executes
story.soThat: I can verify target format, output location, and potential issues before committing to the conversion

task.title: Implement Validation Screen (AC-1)
task.subtask: Add validation screen state to Model (showValidation, validationPassed, validationWarnings, validationFiles)
Create validation screen layout using Lipgloss (header, batch details, file list, warnings, shortcuts)
Implement validation trigger after format selection from Story 4-3
Add keyboard handlers ('c' confirm, 'e' edit, Esc cancel)
Add unit tests for validation screen rendering and navigation

task.title: File List Display (AC-2)
task.subtask: Create ValidationFile struct with name, path, size, source/target formats, warnings
Implement formatFileList() with numbered entries and format arrows
Add scrolling for long file lists (show first 10, arrow keys scroll)
Implement format arrow generation with color-coding
Add unit tests for file list rendering

task.title: Warning Detection (AC-3)
task.subtask: Reuse detectUnmappableParams() from Story 4-2 for warning detection
Create Warning struct with file, parameter count, parameters, severity, description
Implement warning summary rendering with color-coding by severity
Add warning severity classification (minor <3 params, significant ≥3)
Add unit tests for warning detection and severity

task.title: Settings Editor (AC-4)
task.subtask: Add settings editor state (showSettingsEditor, editorCursor, edited values)
Create settings editor layout (format selector, directory input, file checkboxes)
Implement field navigation (Tab/arrows between fields)
Apply settings changes and re-validate on save
Add unit tests for editor navigation and value changes

task.title: Directory Validation (AC-5)
task.subtask: Implement validateOutputDirectory() checking existence, permissions, disk space
Create directory creation prompt with 'c' create option
Implement detectOverwrites() finding existing files at output paths
Create overwrite warning prompt requiring explicit confirmation
Add unit tests for directory validation and overwrite detection

task.title: Confirmation and Execution (AC-6)
task.subtask: Add confirmation state (showConfirmation, confirmationSummary)
Create confirmation prompt layout with batch summary
Implement confirmation trigger after validation passes
Handle 'y' starts conversion, 'n' cancels with settings preserved
Add unit tests for confirmation flow

task.title: Conversion Plan Summary (AC-7)
task.subtask: Implement calculateConversionPlan() with size/time estimation
Create ConversionPlan struct with statistics
Render plan summary with human-readable sizes and time
Add disk space warnings (error if insufficient, warn if low)
Add unit tests for plan calculation

task.title: Integration and Polish
task.subtask: Integrate validation into TUI flow (between format selection and confirmation)
Update '?' help overlay with validation shortcuts
Add visual polish (consistent styling, transitions, loading indicators)
End-to-end testing (full flow, cancellation, various scenarios)
Performance optimization (cache results, async validation)

criterion.title: Pre-Conversion Validation Screen
criterion.requirement: After user selects target format (from Story 4-3), validation screen appears before conversion starts
Validation screen displays before the confirmation prompt in Story 4-3
Screen shows comprehensive conversion plan: files, formats, output, warnings
User can review all details before proceeding to confirmation
Escape key cancels and returns to file browser

criterion.title: File List with Format Indicators
criterion.requirement: Display all selected files in conversion order
Show source format → target format for each file
Color-code conversions: Green (same format), Blue (cross-format), Yellow (warnings)
Display file size for each file
Show warning icon (⚠️) next to files with unmappable parameters
List scrollable if more than 10 files (with scroll indicator)

criterion.title: Warning Detection and Display
criterion.requirement: Scan all selected files for unmappable parameters (reuse Story 4-2 logic)
Display warning summary: total warnings, affected files
List each warning with file name and specific unmappable parameters
Color-code warnings: Yellow (minor data loss), Orange (significant loss)
Show "No warnings" message if all conversions are lossless

criterion.title: Editable Settings
criterion.requirement: 'e' key on validation screen opens settings editor
User can change target format (re-validate after change)
User can change output directory (with path validation)
User can deselect individual files from batch
Changes update validation screen in real-time

criterion.title: Output Directory Validation
criterion.requirement: Verify output directory exists before allowing conversion
Show warning if directory doesn't exist (offer to create)
Check write permissions on output directory
Detect potential overwrites (files with same name exist)
Warn if overwrite will occur, require explicit confirmation

criterion.title: Confirmation and Execution
criterion.requirement: After validation passes, 'c' key shows final confirmation prompt
Confirmation displays summary: file count, target format, output location
'y' key starts conversion (transitions to Story 4-3 progress screen)
'n' or Esc key cancels and returns to file browser
Selection and settings preserved if user cancels

criterion.title: Conversion Plan Summary
criterion.requirement: Display estimated conversion time based on file count and size
Show total input size and estimated output size
Indicate if batch includes lossless conversions (same format)
Show estimated disk space needed
Warn if disk space insufficient

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Requirement: Preview before export with confirmation screen showing files to convert, target format, output location. User must confirm (y/n), can edit settings before confirming, can cancel without side effects.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: TUI provides interactive file browsing with live parameter preview, batch progress visualization, and visual validation before conversion. Built with Bubbletea framework for keyboard-driven workflows.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Bubbletea Elm Architecture (Model-Update-View) with Lipgloss styling. State transitions between screens (file browser → validation → progress). Pure functions for Update/View.

doc.title: Story 4.1 - Bubbletea File Browser
doc.snippet: Story 4-1 provides file selection with selected map[int]bool. Story 4-4 uses selected files for validation screen input.

doc.title: Story 4.2 - Live Parameter Preview
doc.snippet: Story 4-2 implements detectUnmappableParams() for format compatibility checking. Story 4-4 reuses this function for batch warning detection in validation screen.

doc.title: Story 4.3 - Batch Progress Display
doc.snippet: Story 4-3 implements format selection and confirmation prompt. Story 4-4 inserts validation screen between format selection and confirmation for safer conversions.

artifact.reason: Used for parsing files during validation to detect unmappable parameters. Needed for warning detection.
Used for parsing files during validation to detect unmappable parameters. Needed for warning detection.
Used for parsing files during validation to detect unmappable parameters. Needed for warning detection.

go-modules.module: Core TUI framework for validation screen
Cross-platform disk space check (Unix and Windows)

technical.constraint: BLOCKS ON: Story 4-1 (file selection), Story 4-2 (warning detection), Story 4-3 (conversion flow)
COMPLETES: Epic 4 - This is the final story in the TUI Interface epic
Must use Bubbletea v2 experimental with state transitions between screens
Cross-platform directory validation (Unix syscall.Statfs, Windows golang.org/x/sys/windows)
Must work on Windows, macOS, Linux terminals with minimum 80x24 size
Validation scan must be async (don't block UI, show "Validating..." spinner)

architectural.constraint: Extend Stories 4-1, 4-2, 4-3 Model - Add validation state (showValidation, validationPassed, validationWarnings)
Insert validation screen between format selection and confirmation in TUI flow
Settings editor centralizes format/directory/file selection editing
Cache validation results (don't re-scan files on every render)
State immutability: Follow Bubbletea Elm Architecture - pure functions
Preserve file selection and settings on cancellation

ui-ux.constraint: Validation screen layout: Header, batch details, file list (scrollable), warnings, plan summary, shortcuts
Color coding: Green (same-format), Blue (cross-format), Yellow (minor warnings), Orange (significant warnings)
Format arrows: "XMP → NP3" for clarity, "XMP → XMP" for same-format updates
Scrollable file list: Show first 10, "(10 of 50, ↓ for more)" indicator
Settings editor: Radio buttons (format), text input (directory), checkboxes (files)
Disk space display: Color-coded (green sufficient, red insufficient)

validation.constraint: Directory existence: Check with os.Stat, offer to create with os.MkdirAll
Write permissions: Test with temp file creation/deletion
Disk space: Get available bytes, compare against estimated output size
Overwrites: Check each output path with os.Stat, list existing files
Warning severity: Minor (<3 unmappable params), Significant (≥3 params OR critical data)

interface.name: validateOutputDirectory
interface.description: Check directory existence, write permissions, and available disk space. Return error if validation fails.

interface.name: detectOverwrites
interface.description: Check for existing files at output paths. Return list of files that will be overwritten with size comparison.

interface.name: calculateConversionPlan
interface.description: Calculate batch statistics: sizes, time estimate, cross-format count, disk space needed.

interface.name: formatFileList
interface.description: Render numbered file list with format arrows, sizes, and warning icons.

interface.name: detectBatchWarnings
interface.description: Scan all files for unmappable parameters. Reuses detectUnmappableParams() from Story 4-2.

fields.field: Size int64 - File size in bytes
HasWarnings bool - True if unmappable params detected
ParameterCount int - Number of unmappable parameters
NewSize int64 - Estimated new file size
editedTargetFormat string - Temp value during edit
editedOutputDir string - Temp value during edit

interface.name: Keyboard events
interface.keys: c: Confirm and proceed (from validation to confirmation)
Esc: Cancel validation, return to file browser
y/n: Confirm or cancel in confirmation prompt
Arrow keys: Scroll file list in validation screen
Tab: Navigate fields in settings editor

tests.standards:
Story 4-4 follows the same testing standards as Stories 4-1, 4-2, 4-3:
- Unit tests using Go's testing package with table-driven test pattern - Test coverage target: 85% minimum for cmd/tui/ package - Integration tests with real sample files and full TUI flow - Cross-platform testing: Windows, macOS, Linux - Visual inspection: Validation screen layout, colors, scrolling
Testing framework: Go standard library testing package Cross-platform: Test directory validation on all platforms Edge cases: Non-existent directories, permission errors, disk full scenarios CI/CD: Tests run in GitHub Actions on all platforms

locations.location: cmd/tui/validation_test.go - Unit tests for validation screen and warning detection
cmd/tui/settings_test.go - Unit tests for settings editor navigation and changes
cmd/tui/model_test.go - Extended tests for Model with validation state
examples/np3/ - 22 NP3 sample files for warning detection testing
examples/xmp/ - 913 XMP sample files for validation testing
examples/lrtemplate/ - 544 lrtemplate sample files for validation testing

ideas.test-idea: TestValidationScreenDisplay - Verify screen renders with all sections (header, batch details, file list, warnings, shortcuts)
TestValidationTrigger - Test validation screen appears after format selection from Story 4-3
TestFileListFormatting - Test format arrows (XMP→NP3), color coding, warning icons
TestFileListScrolling - Test scrolling for 10+ files, scroll indicator display
TestWarningDetection - Test detectBatchWarnings() finds unmappable params for all formats
TestWarningSeverity - Test severity classification (minor vs significant)
TestNoWarnings - Test "No warnings" display when all conversions lossless
TestSettingsEditor - Test 'e' opens editor, Tab navigates fields, Enter saves
TestSettingsRevalidation - Test changing format triggers re-validation
TestDirectoryValidation - Test directory existence, permission checks, disk space
TestDirectoryCreation - Test 'c' creates missing directory
TestOverwriteDetection - Test detectOverwrites() finds existing files
TestOverwriteConfirmation - Test overwrite warning prompt requires explicit 'y'
TestConfirmationPrompt - Test 'c' shows confirmation after validation passes
TestConfirmationStartsConversion - Test 'y' transitions to Story 4-3 progress screen
TestCancellationPreservesState - Test 'n' returns to browser with settings intact
TestConversionPlanCalculation - Test size/time estimation accuracy
TestDiskSpaceWarning - Test warning when space < 2× output, error when insufficient
TestFullValidationFlow - Test browse → select → validate → edit → confirm → convert
TestCancellationAtEachStep - Test Esc at validation, editor, confirmation
TestDirectoryValidationWindows - Test directory checks on Windows
TestDirectoryValidationUnix - Test syscall.Statfs on macOS/Linux
